code: import React,{useState}from'react';import useFetch from'../hooks/useFetch';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TransferForm=()=>{const[date,setDate]=useState('');const[transferringBase,setTransferringBase]=useState('');const[receivingBase,setReceivingBase]=useState('');const[equipmentType,setEquipmentType]=useState('');const[quantity,setQuantity]=useState(0);const{postData}=useFetch('/api/transfers');const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();postData({date,transferringBase,receivingBase,equipmentType,quantity});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Date:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"date",value:date,onChange:e=>setDate(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Transferring Base:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:transferringBase,onChange:e=>setTransferringBase(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Receiving Base:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:receivingBase,onChange:e=>setReceivingBase(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Equipment Type:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:equipmentType,onChange:e=>setEquipmentType(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Quantity:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",value:quantity,onChange:e=>setQuantity(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Submit"})]});};export default TransferForm;
